deviations.what: The 'Edit' (toggleAreaPriority) and 'Toggle Footer' actions are wired to backend events; the original toggled title-area priority and footer visibility imperatively — not reproduced server-side.

f:DynamicPage with title (heading, expanded/snapped tnt:InfoLabel, actions), pinnable header (ObjectAttributes), content (two long Texts) and footer. The footer message Button binds text and visible='{= !!${/MESSAGESLENGTH}}' to a model field (initial 0), reproducing the original {/messagesLength} wiring.
